mapper.sql: org_code, org_name, org_level, parent_org_code, org_type, is_trading_org, approval_limit, fx_business_flag, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_org ORDER BY org_level, org_code

WITH RECURSIVE org_hierarchy AS ( SELECT org_code, org_name, org_level, parent_org_code, org_type, is_trading_org, approval_limit, fx_business_flag, status, created_at, updated_at FROM fx_org WHERE org_code = #{orgCode} UNION ALL SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, o.org_level, o.parent_org_code, o.org_type, o.is_trading_org, o.approval_limit, o.fx_business_flag, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM fx_org o INNER JOIN org_hierarchy oh ON o.org_code = oh.parent_org_code ) SELECT * FROM org_hierarchy ORDER BY org_level DESC

WITH RECURSIVE org_hierarchy AS ( SELECT org_code, org_name, org_level, parent_org_code, org_type, is_trading_org, approval_limit, fx_business_flag, status, created_at, updated_at FROM fx_org WHERE org_code = #{orgCode} UNION ALL SELECT o.org_code, o.org_name, o.org_level, o.parent_org_code, o.org_type, o.is_trading_org, o.approval_limit, o.fx_business_flag, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM fx_org o INNER JOIN org_hierarchy oh ON o.parent_org_code = oh.org_code ) SELECT * FROM org_hierarchy ORDER BY org_level, org_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_org (org_code, org_name, org_level, parent_org_code, org_type, is_trading_org, approval_limit, fx_business_flag, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{orgLevel}, #{parentOrgCode}, #{orgType}, #{isTradingOrg}, #{approvalLimit}, #{fxBusinessFlag}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_org SET org_name = #{orgName}, org_level = #{orgLevel}, parent_org_code = #{parentOrgCode}, org_type = #{orgType}, is_trading_org = #{isTradingOrg}, approval_limit = #{approvalLimit}, fx_business_flag = #{fxBusinessFlag}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE org_code = #{orgCode}
